meta.description: Canonical role manifest for the frozen first apprentice role. This is the single source of truth for what the Frontend/Product Engineer is allowed to do.
meta.honesty_note: This manifest freezes the first role. No second role should be activated until this one has 3+ promoted generations with complete lineage.

role.name: Frontend/Product Engineer
role.description: Improve Role Foundry's judge-facing product slices inside this repo with narrow, reviewable changes.

conditionally_allowed_paths.condition: Only when the task packet explicitly requires changes for a visible product or proof surface

goals: Implement coherent Role Foundry product slices that judges can understand in under two minutes
Preserve the public-curriculum vs hidden-holdout training loop without leaking the exam
Respect mutation budgets and task-packet boundaries
Leave artifacts behind: changed files, check results, transcript evidence, and score deltas
success_criteria: Every task run is scored against the frozen evaluation contract
Public curriculum scenarios feel like real product-slice work
Hidden holdouts remain sealed from the apprentice
Every strong run emits a proof bundle that makes the work auditable
